item.accents.bandolier.desc: Preparedness worn lightly across the chest.
item.accents.captain_hat.desc: Once guided a steady course. Now it simply remembers the sea.
item.accents.christmas_hat.desc: Carries quiet warmth from a colder season.
item.accents.cowboy_hat.desc: Shaped by sun, dust, and long horizons.
item.accents.crown.desc: It sits heavier in the mind than on the head.
item.accents.dragon_skull.desc: Even without fire, it keeps its gaze.
item.accents.hermes_boots.desc: Made for motion, even when standing still.
item.accents.holstered_belt.desc: A sturdy belt with a well-worn holster.
item.accents.horns.desc: A shape borrowed from old stories.
item.accents.kasa_hat.desc: Shelter beneath wide and patient shade.
item.accents.king_mask.desc: Great and terrifying. Height not included.
item.accents.overtop_hat.desc: At some point, it was decided that one hat was not enough.
item.accents.pickelhaube.desc: A relic of order and careful lines.
item.accents.pirate_hat.desc: Salt air still lingers in its folds.
item.accents.pumpkin_hat.desc: The pumpkin watches the world with quiet suspicion. Perhaps for a reason.
item.accents.quiver.desc: Not every arrow is meant to be drawn.
item.accents.scarf.desc: Ideal for warmth and dramatic turns.
item.accents.sheathed_katana.desc: Balance preserved within its resting form.
item.accents.skull.desc: It has already done all its thinking.
item.accents.sombrero.desc: Broad shade for slow and open days.
item.accents.straw_hat.desc: Light enough to forget you are wearing it.
item.accents.top_hat.desc: A quiet gesture toward form and ritual.
item.accents.tundra_hood.desc: For winds that whisper and teeth that chatter.
item.accents.wide_brim_hat.desc: For tea parties and dark rituals alike.
item.accents.wings.desc: Not meant for flight, only for the feeling.
